description: Template schema for Yash Poly Plast batch traceability records. One record per production batch, covering the full thread: RM receipt (IQC) → Blow Moulding (IPC) → Leak Test → OQC → COA → Despatch. Populate one JSON object per batch following this schema.

batch_no.description: Unique batch identifier. YY=year, MM=month, NNN=sequence.

product_id.description: Link to product master. PRD001=CAN-5L, PRD002=BTL-1L, PRD003=BTL-200ML, PRD004=BTL-100ML.

mould_id.description: Tooling/mould identifier used for this batch.

rm_batches.description: Raw material lots consumed in this batch. One entry per material lot.

iqc_ref.description: Reference to IQC inspection record for this RM lot (process PR001).

masterbatch_lot.description: Lot number of colour/additive masterbatch used.

blow_moulding_params.description: Key process parameters recorded at blow moulding station (process PR004).

ipc_ref.description: Reference to In-Process Control inspection record (process PR006).

leak_test_ref.description: Reference to leak test record (process PR007).

oqc_ref.description: Reference to Outgoing Quality Control inspection record (process PR009).

coa_ref.description: Reference to Certificate of Analysis issued to customer with this batch.

rejection_details.description: Breakdown of rejections by defect type. Leave empty array [] if no rejections.

customer_id.description: C001=Arabian Petroleum, C002=Apar Industries, C003=Exsan Industries.
